nodes.name: === Changelog ===
nodes.info:
### 2026-05-11
- Iter4h: chart legend now shows the current min/max cell number, e.g. "min (cell 8)" / "max (cell 2)". `bb_chart_format` reads `flow.bms_state` for the latest `cell_voltages/min_index` and `cell_voltages/max_index` per bank and injects them into the ui_chart series names. No schema change.

### 2026-05-11
- Iter4f: fix `bb_chart_query` to use `influxdb_config` (db=tmp) — the bms_health measurement is written to `tmp`, not `infra` as the node name suggested. Note: `cb_trend_query` reads from `infra` so the trend pipeline has been silently empty; not changed here, flagged for follow-up.

### 2026-05-11
- Iter4e: 48h cell min/max line chart per bank. New `bb_chart_query` (influxdb in, 48h MEAN(cell_min/cell_max) GROUP BY time(15m), bank FILL(none)) -> `bb_chart_format` (function, 3 outputs) -> per-bank `bb_chart_<bank>` (ui_chart, line, order 2 inside each bank group, sits below the cell grid). Refreshes on each 180s `cb_cron` tick and on Refresh button click.

### 2026-05-11
- Iter4d: manual refresh. New `bb_grp_ctrl` ui_group at top of Batteries tab with a `bb_btn_refresh` ui_button ("↻ Refresh") wired into `bb_publish`. Click fires the publish function on demand without waiting for the 180s tick.

### 2026-05-11
- Iter4c: dashboard publish now reuses the 180s `cb_cron` tick — dedicated `bb_pub_cron` removed. Dashboard cards refresh on the same cadence as the evaluator (every 3 minutes, wall-clock aligned to 0/3 min).

### 2026-05-11
- Iter4b: dark card theme, white text. Per-cell tile now shows signed deviation from bank avg as the dominant value (large), with voltage below. Header now carries total voltage + current next to bank name (current colored green when charging, amber when discharging). Min cell border cyan, max cell border gold.

### 2026-05-11
- Iter4: dashboard visualization. New "Batteries" tab, one card per bank stacked vertically.
- `bb_pub_cron` (cronplus, 5s) -> `bb_publish` (function, 3 outputs) -> per-bank `bb_tpl_<bank>` (ui_template).
- `bb_publish` reads `flow.bms_state`, computes per-cell severity (ok/warn/crit) using same thresholds as `cb_evaluate`: cell_under <2.80V / cell_over >3.60V => crit; |v - bank_avg| > 30mV => warn. Delta severity: <50mV ok, 50-100mV warn, >=100mV crit. Temps outside [-10,50]C and MOSFET >60C => crit. Switches not ON => crit. Comm dropout >3min dims the card and shows STALE banner.
- Each card: header (bank name + age), summary grid (SOC, voltage, current, power, cycles, delta, T1/T2/MOSFET, min/max/avg cell), switch chips, 4x4 cell tile grid (idx + voltage, color-coded; min cell border blue, max cell border red).

### 2026-05-05
- Iter3: debounce + trend.
- Per-condition debounce in `cb_evaluate`. Statistical checks (cell_delta_warn/alert, cell_outlier_*, temp_high/low_*, mosfet_temp_high) require 3 consecutive ticks (~9min @ 180s) before flipping state. Safety-critical checks (no_data, comm_dropout, cell_under, cell_over, switch_charge_off, switch_discharge_off) emit `active` immediately, require 3 clear ticks to resolve. Events (bms_reboot, cycles_reset) stay one-shot.
- Trend pipeline: `cb_trend_cron` (cronplus, hourly @ HH:05) -> `cb_trend_query` (influxdb in, raw output, 1h-bucketed MEDIAN of cell_delta over 24h GROUP BY bank) -> `cb_trend_eval` (linear regression of slope, mV/day) -> `cb_alert_out`. Threshold 5 mV/day; needs >=6 hourly buckets.

### 2026-05-05
- Iter2: monitoring pipeline. cron-plus tick @ 180s aligned -> cb_evaluate -> alert MQTT (`checkbattery/alert`) + InfluxDB `infra.bms_health`.
- Health checks: comm dropout (3min), cell delta warn/alert (50/100mV), cell hard limits (2.8/3.6V), per-cell outlier (30mV from bank avg), temperatures 1+2 (-10/50C, sensors 3/4 ignored), MOSFET temp (60C), switch charge/discharge OFF, BMS reboot, cycle counter monotonic.
- InfluxDB metrics per bank: soc_percent, total_voltage, current, power, balance_current, num_cycles, cell_delta/min/max/avg, capacity_ah, mosfet_temp, temp1, temp2.
- Alerts emit only on state transitions (active / cleared) -- no per-tick spam.

### 2026-05-05
- Bootstrap: subscribe to bat_ost, bat_west, bat_big at central MQTT broker; capture last payload per leaf-topic into `global.checkbattery_samples` for schema discovery.

nodes.name: capture
evaluate
24h cell_delta medians
nodes.query: SELECT MEDIAN(cell_delta) FROM bms_health WHERE time > now() - 24h GROUP BY time(1h), bank FILL(none)

nodes.name: trend_eval
publish per-bank state
bat_ost card
nodes.format:
{{msg.payload.bank}} {{msg.payload.voltage | number:2}} V {{msg.payload.current | number:2}} A
STALE {{msg.payload.ageS}}s updated {{msg.payload.ageS}}s ago
no data received yet
SOC{{msg.payload.soc | number:1}}%
Power{{msg.payload.power | number:0}} W
Cycles{{msg.payload.cycles}}
Cell Δ{{(msg.payload.cellDelta*1000) | number:0}} mV
Cell Avg{{msg.payload.cellAvg | number:3}} V
Min / Max{{msg.payload.cellMin | number:3}} / {{msg.payload.cellMax | number:3}}
Temp 1{{msg.payload.t1 | number:1}} °C
Temp 2{{msg.payload.t2 | number:1}} °C
MOSFET{{msg.payload.mt | number:1}} °C
charge: {{msg.payload.swCharge}} discharge: {{msg.payload.swDisch}} balance: {{msg.payload.swBal}}
cell {{c.i}}
{{c.devMv >= 0 ? '+' : ''}}{{c.devMv}} mV
{{c.v | number:3}} V

nodes.name: 48h cell min/max
nodes.query: SELECT MEAN(cell_min) AS cmin, MEAN(cell_max) AS cmax FROM bms_health WHERE time > now() - 48h GROUP BY time(15m), bank FILL(none)

nodes.name: format chart data
